name: SuperSorry
short_description: You play as a salaryman who gets caught in various everyday troubles and overcomes them with acrobatic bows. From boss reprimands to client complaints and family issues, showcase your elegant apology skills across different scenarios. What shocking ending awaits?
detailed_description:
Game Overview

You play as a salaryman who gets caught in various everyday troubles and overcomes them with acrobatic bows. From boss reprimands to client complaints and family issues, showcase your elegant apology skills across different scenarios. What shocking ending awaits?

Features

  • []Unique Bowing Actions: Master various techniques like spinning and jumping bows to win over others.
    []Diverse Stages: Experience immersive gameplay in realistic environments like the office, client sites, home, and public spaces.
    []Comical Storyline: Enjoy a humor-filled scenario that lets you progress while laughing.

Recommended For

  • []Those who want to laugh off everyday stress.
    []Players seeking a new kind of action game.

    Master the art of apology in “Super Dogeza!”
